meaning: n.异想天开,随心所欲,反复无常
examples: It's easy to understand and the minimalist approach keeps the whimsicality in check.
The surest defense against Evil is extreme individualism, originality of thinking, whimsicality, even – if you will – eccentricity.
Generally speaking, the customer in consumer often can rational choice, but also will have joy of whimsicality and affection, the pursuit.
